XpGuide.title: The 3 currencies — guide
XpGuide.subtitle: 🪙 Path Coins · 🏴 Territory Rep · ⚔️ Arena Honor
XpGuide.pathCoinsForWhat: Redeem discounts at local shops (QR scan), level up ranks, unlock map icons and Runner Lights, boosts & skins in the shop.
XpGuide.pathCoinsFromWhere: Every run — streets (+50), full streets (+250), territories with crew (+500), km, streak bonuses, achievements, ad videos.
XpGuide.territoryRepForWhat: Level up crew league (more 🪙 Path Coins per territory for all members), activate crew buffs (bonus km, streak protection), start crew wars against neighboring crews.
XpGuide.territoryRepFromWhere: Crew members only — per territory your crew claims, for crew wins in the weekly league, and for territories you hold longer than 7 days.
XpGuide.arenaHonorForWhat: Your arena rank (Wood → Legend), top-100 season rewards (legendary seals, exclusive Guardian skins, gems).
XpGuide.arenaHonorFromWhere: Guardian fights — wins earn honor, losses cost honor, 3+ wins in a row give a streak bonus.
XpGuide.arenaHonorWarning: Resets every 4 weeks at season start. Only fighters from this season enter the ranking.
XpGuide.freeViaAd: FREE VIA AD — start directly here:
XpGuide.adExplainer:
Both are 30-second videos. Difference = reward: 24 h works the whole day (only 1× daily),

15 min

is for a planned run (up to 4× per day). Smart: grab 24 h in the morning and stack

15 min

later as needed.
XpGuide.row24hBoostFreeSub: For the whole day · only 1× per 24 h
XpGuide.row15minBoostFreeSub: For a targeted run · every 6 h again
XpGuide.sectionAdsSubtitle: Watch videos for bonus Path Coins
XpGuide.preWalkExplainer: When you tap "Start running", a popup appears: "Video for +250 🪙 starter bonus?" — optional. Available again every 6 h.
XpGuide.supplyDropExplainer: Loot crates (📦🎁💎👑) appear randomly on the map. Walk ≤25 m close, then choose: grab now (+25 🪙) or 30-sec video (+100 🪙). Potion chance stays in both cases.
XpGuide.rowStreakRescue: Save streak · when streak in danger
XpGuide.streakRescueExplainer: Between 18–36 h after your last run a rescue popup appears. A video saves the streak instead of resetting to 0. Available once every 12 h.
XpGuide.footer: 🪙 Path Coins unlock new ranks, map icons and Runner Lights. Boost multipliers apply to ALL Path Coin sources simultaneously — Territory Rep and Arena Honor stay unaffected.

Crew.heroSubtitle: Found your crew — with friends, family, classmates, coworkers or neighbors. Run together, secure your territories, climb the leagues.
Crew.featTerritoryDesc: Claim streets — your color paints the neighborhood.
Crew.featRivalsDesc: 1:1 weekly duels against neighbor crews. Winner gets 🏴 territory rep boost.
Crew.featChallengesDesc: Weekly team goals — 150 km, 20 territories, early birds.
Crew.featEventsDesc: Coordinate meeting points, runs with the crew.
Crew.healthIntro: Crews aren't just fun. Studies show: social running has measurable effects.
Crew.healthHeartDesc: Regular walking/running lowers blood pressure and infarct risk.
Crew.healthMentalDesc: 30 min movement/day reduces depression and anxiety symptoms.
Crew.healthEnduranceDesc: Group athletes stay active twice as long as solo runners.
Crew.healthSleepDesc: Daily steps improve deep sleep phases and recovery.
Crew.healthCalDesc: A 6-km run burns ~350 kcal — crew sessions add up.
Crew.healthBonesDesc: Walking strengthens bones and prevents osteoporosis later in life.
Crew.healthStressDesc: Outdoor activity lowers cortisol — combined with community doubly so.
Crew.healthSocialDesc: Crew members report significantly more new friendships.
Crew.healthSourceNote: Values: averages from WHO, Cochrane and RKI studies on social activity.
Crew.leagueIntro: Every crew starts monthly in Bronze. With km run you climb until month's end. On the 1st of each month all crews start fresh — your final rank stays as a season trophy permanently visible.
Crew.leagueExplain: Your crew's league shows as a badge on your profile and everywhere in search. It's independent of rankings — rankings count individual performance, leagues fight as the whole crew.
Crew.typesIntro: Every group that has fun together is worth a crew founding.
Crew.testimonialFooter: Founding takes less than 30 seconds. Invite code generated automatically.
Crew.joinIntro: Enter the invite code you got from the crew.
Crew.joinNotFound: Crew with this code not found.
Crew.joinSuccessWithTerritories:
✅ Joined "{name}"!
🏆 {count} solo territories activated · +{xp} 🪙 Path Coins
Crew.createSubtitle: Under 30 seconds. Then immediately start running and securing territories.
Crew.step2Title: Give your crew a face + voice
Crew.zipHint: Your color appears here on the map. Rival crews from neighboring ZIPs can challenge you.
Crew.factionHeader: 4. CREW FACTION · Buff for all members
Crew.factionSwitchHint: Switching later costs 1,200 💎 and has a 30-day cooldown.
Crew.perkInviteCodeDesc: Shareable via link, QR or WhatsApp
Crew.noContractHint: 💡 No contract, no cost. You can disband anytime.
Crew.testimonial1Quote: Since we run as a crew, nobody drops out anymore. Solo I would've quit twice already.
Crew.testimonial2Quote: Our turf — that's ours. Neighbor crew tried to take our hood. No chance.
Crew.testimonial3Quote: Weekly goal 150 km. The eight of us nail it in 5 days. Simply because it's about something.
Crew.ovDuelDemoHint: Real duels start at launch via auto-matchmaking between crews
Crew.ovActivityHintOne: 💡 {count} member hasn't run yet — push them in chat!
Crew.ovActivityHintMany: 💡 {count} members haven't run yet — push them in chat!
Crew.memDemoHint: Real member list appears once real crew members have joined
Crew.memReminderAlert: Reminder push to inactive members — stub
Crew.memActionsAlert:
Actions for {name}
• Promote to captain
• Promote to mod
• Remove from crew
Crew.memRolesAlert: Role editor (mod, event planner, motivator) coming soon.
Crew.chDemoHint: Live challenges load from the database at launch
Crew.evDemoHint: Live events load from the database at launch
Crew.chatDemoHint: Real crew chat goes live at launch via Supabase Realtime
Crew.chatVoiceAlert: 🎙️ Voice note recording starts — backend upload coming.
Crew.chatSendAlert: Chat send will be wired to realtime backend.
Crew.feedDemoHint: Real feed shows activity of real crew members at launch
Crew.setRulesDefault:
1. Be kind — criticism yes, but fair.
2. No ads in chat.
3. Cancel events on time if you can't make it.
4. All paces welcome — nobody gets left behind.
Crew.setPushAlert: Browser push permission requested — backend service worker coming.
Crew.setPremiumDesc: Up to 200 members · custom branding · stats export · priority support · merch discounts
Crew.setSponsorDesc: A local shop can sponsor your crew — discounts for members, branding on your cover, Experience bonuses.
Crew.setMerchDesc: Crew tees with crest print via print-on-demand. No stock, no risk.
Crew.gdNoTrophies: No captured guardians yet. Win 3× in a row vs. a crew with a different archetype → you steal their guardian!
Crew.gdNoBattles: No battles yet. Redeem a deal at an arena shop and challenge other crews!
Crew.gdNoActive: No active guardian yet — pick one under "My Guardian Collection" below.

Deals.tabSubtitle: Runners redeem Experience at local shops · shops reach exactly the audience already walking past their door.
Deals.heroBodyRich: Do something for your health, have fun, save real money at local shops and support your hood — all in one walk. Scan the QR at the counter, Experience becomes a discount. No points circus.
Deals.doubleWinBodyRich: Every km to a partner shop is a km for your health — studies show measurable effects. And at the till you get the discount on top.
Deals.stat1Desc: Regular walking measurably lowers heart-attack risk.
Deals.stat2Desc: 30 min of activity per day reduces stress + anxiety.
Deals.stat3Desc: A relaxed 6 km run — almost incidentally.
Deals.statSourceNote: Values from WHO/Cochrane/RKI studies on daily activity.
Deals.whyLocalIntro: Your Path Coins flow straight into your hood — not to Amazon.
Deals.wl1Desc: Every euro at a local shop stays ~70 % in the region — at Amazon, 0 %.
Deals.wl2Desc: The baker, the pharmacist, the bookseller — real faces instead of review stars.
Deals.wl3Desc: Shops you'd otherwise walk past. Suddenly your new favourite café.
Deals.wl4Desc: No delivery fleet, no packaging, no return logistics — you just walk over.
Deals.wl5Desc: No 2-day wait. Buy today, use today, happy today.
Deals.wl6Desc: Fair small-business prices instead of platform fees that kill jobs.
Deals.wl7Desc: A short detour to the café, bakery or florist — much nicer than collecting an Amazon parcel.
Deals.wl8Desc: Try it on, touch it, get advice in person. No cheap copy in a box, no return shipment.
Deals.exampleDealsIntro: What typical discounts look like — individual per shop.
Deals.ed1Deal: Free cappuccino after a 3 km walk
Deals.ed6Deal: Free scoop of ice cream after 5 km
Deals.exampleDealsNote: Placeholder deals — real shops follow at launch in your city.
Deals.step1Desc: Get within 20 m of a partner shop — whether deliberate or by chance.
Deals.step2Desc: Quick scan at the counter. Takes 2 seconds. Presence proven.
Deals.step3Desc: Show the deal on your phone, Path Coins are deducted automatically, you save right at the till.
Deals.earnIntro: The more you walk, the more deals you can redeem.
Deals.fair1Desc: GPS check + rotating QR. No online abuse — the shop benefits, not some bot.
Deals.fair2Desc: Every deal shows openly: 1×/week, 1×/month or unlimited. No hidden clauses.
Deals.fair3Desc: Shops only see anonymous check-in + km walked. No profile tracking, no ad IDs.
Deals.fair4Desc: Your 🪙 Path Coins don't expire. Cash in when you want — not because some number is about to expire.
Deals.comingSoonTitle: No shops in your hood yet
Deals.comingSoonBodyRich: Know a shop that fits perfectly? Tell us — we reach out and you get 1,000 bonus Experience as soon as they go live.
Deals.comingSoonAlert: Shop suggestion: partner@myarea365.de — name + city is enough.
Deals.partnerHero1: Foot traffic has never been so
Deals.partnerHeroBodyRich: Thousands of people walk through your hood every day. With MyArea365 they become customers — when they get a real reward for the detour to your door.
Deals.partnerCtaSignupAlert: Partner signup: please contact partner@myarea365.de — self-service onboarding coming.
Deals.impactTitle: Your shop becomes part of the movement
Deals.impactBodyRich: You don't just sell coffee, bread or shoes — you motivate people in your hood to get active. Every check-in at your shop is one more km someone walked for their health. Revenue + community impact in one.
Deals.imp1Desc: Average walk distance for one deal.
Deals.imp2Desc: At 150 min of activity per week (WHO).
Deals.imp4Desc: From schoolkids to retirees — everyone walks along.
Deals.roiHeader: 💰 WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU CONCRETELY
Deals.roiIntro: Numbers from our pilot phase (60 shops, 6 months in Berlin + Munich). Each shop is individual — these are guideline values.
Deals.roi3Label: revenue in the week after launch
Deals.calcKicker: EXAMPLE CALC · CAFÉ WITH 100 CHECK-INS / MONTH
Deals.calcRealityRich: 💡 Reality is better: 38 % of new customers come back. One redemption brings on average 3 more visits in the following quarter — at no extra MyArea cost.
Deals.tt1Quote: In the first 4 weeks, 142 check-ins, around €1,700 extra revenue. Best advertising we've ever done — and cheaper than half an Instagram post.
Deals.tt2Quote: The running group from Englischer Garten now drops in regularly. Three bought new shoes — one pair alone pays for the whole month.
Deals.tt3Quote: Lunchtime was dead. With MyArea365 we have a regular runner crew on Tuesdays + Thursdays. Table reservations coming soon.
Deals.ttDisclaimer: Numbers from the MyArea365 pilot phase. Individual results may vary.
Deals.usp1Desc: You only pay when someone actually shows up. No impressions, no waste.
Deals.usp2Desc: Reach only people who walked in your radius in the last 7 days.
Deals.usp3Desc: Check-in only within 20 m + QR rotation — no fakes, no abuse.
Deals.usp4Desc: See in real time who redeems, when, from which crew — with weekly trend & heatmap.
Deals.usp5Desc: Sponsor local crews = weekly regulars + free marketing content.
Deals.usp6Desc: Discounts = no VAT trap like vouchers. Everything DATEV-compatible exportable.
Deals.how1Desc: Name, address, opening hours — takes 3 min.
Deals.how3Desc: We send you the counter sticker free of charge.
Deals.how4Desc: Deal goes live. As soon as runners are active in your hood, you appear on their map.
Deals.safetyBodyRich: Per deal you decide how often a runner can redeem. Abuse is prevented automatically by GPS + rotating QR codes + DB limits.
Deals.abuse1Desc: Only redeemable within 20 m of the shop — no online shopping, on-site only.
Deals.abuse2Desc: Screenshots and video copies become useless.
Deals.abuse3Desc: Counter per account + period — no workaround.
Deals.abuse4Desc: On suspicion: walk log + check-in history reviewable.
Deals.pricingIntro: No fixed costs. You only pay when runners arrive.
Deals.planProPerk3: ⚡ Flash deals — 30-min pushes to nearby runners
Deals.planProPerk4: 🔁 Regulars bonus: after 3 visits, the runner automatically gets a better offer
Deals.planProPerk5: 📩 Win back walk-by traffic — reminder push to runners who didn't come in
Deals.planProPerk7: 📰 Hood newsletter: your shop in the monthly mailing
Deals.planProPerk8: 📱 Social kit: ready-made posts for Instagram & Facebook
Deals.planProPerk9: 🏆 Spotlight animation: 3 days / month — pin glows and pulses on the map. Pick the dates yourself in the dashboard (ideal before events, weekends, launches).
Deals.uc1: you run a café and want more morning or after-work guests
Deals.uc2: you run a sports shop — perfect target group is already walking past
Deals.uc3: you do healthy gastro (salads, smoothies, bowls)
Deals.uc4: you run a studio/fitness centre — trial sessions for Experience
Deals.uc5: you're a service provider (hairdresser, masseur) — build regulars
Deals.uc7: you run a bakery — fresh rolls after the morning round
Deals.uc8: you're a pharmacy/drugstore — electrolytes, magnesium, blister plasters
Deals.uc9: you have an ice cream parlour or patisserie — reward after the walk
Deals.uc10: you run a restaurant/bistro — runners are hungry
Deals.uc11: you run a florist — nice impulse buy on the way home
Deals.uc12: you run a wine or fine-food shop — premium audience on a discovery walk
Deals.uc13: you're a bookshop — runners are also readers
Deals.uc14: you sell pet supplies — many walk with their dog
Deals.faq1Q: Do I need to install any tech?
Deals.faq1A: No. You only need a printed QR code (we send the sticker free of charge). Your till stays as it is.
Deals.faq2A: €0 fixed costs. Pay-per-visit from €1 (Basic) or €2 (Pro). One redemption brings on average €8–18 in revenue — pays off from day 1.
Deals.faq3A: Monthly invoice. DATEV export included. VAT compliant.
Deals.faq4A: Yes — per runner/period (one-off, weekly, monthly, quarterly, half-yearly, yearly or unlimited).
Deals.faq5Q: What if someone tries to abuse it?
Deals.faq5A: GPS + rotating QR + account history make it extremely hard. On suspicion we suspend the account at your request.
Deals.faq6A: Yes, monthly. No minimum term, no setup fee.
Deals.bottomCtaTitle: Ready to bring runners to your door?
Deals.bottomCtaBody: Sign up in 10 min. Your shop is live on the map the same day. No contract lock-in, no fixed costs.

Modals.shGuideRich:
MyArea+ — premium subscription: ad-free, streak-freeze stash, map themes.
Power — 🪙 boosts & convenience (save time, not power).
Gems — premium currency for cosmetics & guardian skins.
All ranks, territories, crews & arena are playable without euros.
Modals.owNeutralizedHint: Neutralised — this area can be claimed again on the next walk.
Modals.owDurabilityHint: If the owner walks through here again, the value resets to 100 %.
Modals.owReclaimHint: 💡 Walk a new lap through this territory to reclaim it. Crew territories can only be defended as a crew.
Modals.potIntroRich: 🧪 Potions grant a 1-hour temporary battle bonus (Arena + Boss). On a lost battle, active potions are consumed.
Modals.potNoInventoryHint: Get them via daily deals, loot drops or the gem shop.
Modals.acGpsRequired: GPS position required for the arena. Please allow location access.
Modals.acNoOpponents: No runners from eligible crews. Wait until more members redeem here!

GuardianHelp.ovHeroRich: Your guardian is your personal hood champion. They level up with every walk, get stronger through gear and fight for you & your crew.
GuardianHelp.ovStep1Text: Capture streets → 🪙 Path Coins for you + guardian Experience
GuardianHelp.ovStep2Text: Every level (max 60) = +1 talent point to spend
GuardianHelp.ovStep3Text: Arena shops (on site) or area boss with your crew
GuardianHelp.ovStep4Text: Sigils from battles → max abilities to level 5
GuardianHelp.ovSpecial1Rich: 60 guardians in 4 types (🛡️ infantry · 🐎 cavalry · 🏹 marksman · 🔮 mage)
GuardianHelp.ovSpecial3Rich: Talent tree per guardian — 3 branches × 5 tiers = individual build
GuardianHelp.ovSpecial5Rich: Rage battle system — when full (1000) the active skill fires automatically
GuardianHelp.ovSpecial6Rich: No pay-to-win — sigils, Path Coins & guardian Experience only via walking + fighting
GuardianHelp.gdHeroRich: 60 humanoid guardians in 4 types and 3 rarities (Elite / Epic / Legendary). You start with an elite starter of your choice and collect new ones via battles and milestones.
GuardianHelp.gdRpsBodyRich: Each type has a natural enemy: infantry beats cavalry, cavalry beats marksmen, marksmen beat infantry. Mage is neutral — can't be countered.
GuardianHelp.gdRpsAdvDmgRich: Type advantage: +25% damage · type disadvantage: -25% damage
GuardianHelp.gdInfantryDesc: Shield & steel — soaks hits and counters
GuardianHelp.gdMageDesc: Wildcard — neutral against all type counters
GuardianHelp.talHeroRich: Every level-up grants 1 talent point. You spend it in your guardian's individual talent tree — at level 60 (max) you have 59 points to invest.
GuardianHelp.talBranchSpecDesc: Role-based (DPS / tank / support) — ends in a keystone
GuardianHelp.talBranchUtilityDesc: Generic stat bonuses (HP / Attack / Defense / Speed / crit)
GuardianHelp.talNode2Rich: Keystones (tier 5): unique buffs like "Berserker" (HP<30% +50% Attack) or "Bulwark" (absorbs 1× lethal hit)
GuardianHelp.talNode3Rich: Prereq: tier N can only unlock when tier N-1 has at least rank 1
GuardianHelp.talNode4Rich: Respec: free every 7 days — afterwards costs universal sigils
GuardianHelp.skHeroRich: Each guardian has 5 abilities. Each ability must be unlocked with sigils. Level 5 (expertise) only opens once the other 4 are maxed.
GuardianHelp.skSlotActiveDesc: Fires automatically at full rage (1000) — massive effect
GuardianHelp.skSlotPassiveDesc: Always active: +stat depending on type (Defense/Speed/crit/skill damage)
GuardianHelp.skSlotCombatDesc: Triggers on event: crit hit, taken hit, HP<50% …
GuardianHelp.skSlotRoleDesc: Type-counter bonus: +damage against the natural enemy
GuardianHelp.skSlotExpertiseDesc: Endgame: active skill triggers a secondary effect (unlocked when skills 1-4 are maxed)
GuardianHelp.skSiegelBodyRich: Every skill level costs type-specific sigils. Earned mainly via walking, fighting & missions — daily deals can boost sigils on top.
GuardianHelp.skSiegel1Rich: Arena wins: 1–3 sigils of the opponent's type
GuardianHelp.skSiegel2Rich: Area boss loot: 5–15 sigils (mixed types) + universal sigils for the winner
GuardianHelp.skRageBodyRich: In battle a rage bar builds up (0–1000). Each attack: +100 rage · each hit taken: +50 rage. When full, your active ability fires automatically with massive damage and rage resets to 0.
GuardianHelp.arHeroRich: Arena shops (⚔️ symbol on the map) are shops that regularly host runner duels. Your guardian fights another runner's/crew's guardian.
GuardianHelp.arRule1Rich: GPS proximity: you must be within 2 km of the shop to fight
GuardianHelp.arRule2Rich: Eligibility: you or a crew member must have redeemed there in the last 3 days
GuardianHelp.arRule4Rich: Level spread cap: max ±5 levels between attacker and defender
GuardianHelp.arRule5Rich: Revenge lock 6h: if you were just attacked, you can only retaliate after 6 h
GuardianHelp.arRule6Rich: Weekly cap: max 1 fight against the same runner per week
GuardianHelp.arReward3Rich: Lucky strike: +100 guardian Experience bonus if loser was below 20% HP
GuardianHelp.arReward4Rich: Underdog bonus: +200 guardian Experience if the lower-level guardian wins
GuardianHelp.arReward5Rich: 3-win streak: trophy or fusion (if same archetype)
GuardianHelp.arReward6Rich: Double-down (optional): win +50% guardian Experience, loss = 48 h wounded
GuardianHelp.arReward7Rich: Wound: loser's guardian is paused for up to 24 h
GuardianHelp.arLeagueBodyRich: Battles count toward running 30-day sessions with points for wins, fusions and trophies. At session end:
GuardianHelp.arLeague1Rich: Runner titles (historical in profile): 🥇 Area League Champion · 🥈 Challenger · 🥉 Finalist
GuardianHelp.arLeague2Rich: 1st place crew pack: 80 universal sigils + exclusive banner + 500 💎 crew chest
GuardianHelp.arSpecialBodyRich: Your guardian's skills + talents apply: active ultimate ignites at rage 1000, passive grants permanent stat bonus, combat triggers on events (e.g. crit), role grants type-counter bonus, expertise triggers a secondary effect of the active.
GuardianHelp.bsHeroRich: Area bosses are huge enemies at landmarks (e.g. TV Tower). Winner takes all: only the crew with the most total damage gets the loot.
GuardianHelp.bsWinnerBodyRich: In the end only total damage per crew counts. The crew with the highest value sweeps everything — the others go empty-handed.
GuardianHelp.bsWinner1Rich: Guardian level and gear determine damage per hit
GuardianHelp.bsWinner2: Higher level + better gear = more damage
GuardianHelp.bsWinner3: Strategy: a strongly-built crew with many active members dominates
GuardianHelp.bsParticipantsBodyRich: Per area boss, at most 10 members of a crew can join. First come, first served. Requirement: GPS ≤ 500 m from the boss.
GuardianHelp.bsLootNote: More members → more loot items with mixed rarities. The battle leader / crew leader then distributes items within the crew.
GuardianHelp.bsRole1Rich: Leader — founds the crew, may appoint battle leader, distributes loot
GuardianHelp.bsRole3Rich: Battle leader — specialised role only for raid loot distribution
GuardianHelp.bsImportantBodyRich: Bosses often have 250k+ HP and a 48 h timer. Coordinate in crew chat to be on site early — latecomers may find slots already full. Once defeated = one loot pool, only for the top damage crew.
GuardianHelp.efHeroRich: All buffs, debuffs & combat effects that may appear during an arena or boss battle. Active effects show as icons under the HP bar.
GuardianHelp.efDebuffStunDesc: Skips your next turn. Triggered by Dive ability (30% chance). stun_resist talent can resist it.
GuardianHelp.efDebuffPoisonDesc: Deals 5% MaxHP damage per stack per round. Stacks up to ×3. debuff_cleanse talent removes stacks.
GuardianHelp.efDebuffFlameDesc: 10% MaxHP damage per round (DOT). dot_dmg talent boosts DOTs.
GuardianHelp.efRegenDesc: Regenerates X% MaxHP at round start (regen_pct talent).
GuardianHelp.efLifestealDesc: Heals X% of damage dealt (heal_on_hit talent).
GuardianHelp.efRebirthDesc: Phoenix ability: at 0 HP, fully healed once.
GuardianHelp.efNineLivesDesc: Cat ability: at 0 HP, survives once with 1 HP.
GuardianHelp.efCleanseDesc: debuff_cleanse talent triggers, removes stun + 1 poison stack.
GuardianHelp.efCritDesc: 1.5× damage + bonus from crit_dmg talent. Base crit 10% + crit_pct talent.
GuardianHelp.efBerserkerDesc: DPS keystone: HP<30% triggers +50% Attack. Glows under HP bar while active.
GuardianHelp.efSymbioseDesc: Balanced keystone: HP 40–60% triggers +10% Attack/Defense. Glows under HP bar while active.
GuardianHelp.efThornsDesc: Attacker takes X% of damage dealt back (thorns_pct talent).
GuardianHelp.efCounterDesc: Chance to counter-attack with half damage (counter_pct talent).
GuardianHelp.efFirstStrikeDesc: vs_full_hp talent: +X% damage against enemies at ≥95% HP.
GuardianHelp.efMercyStrikeDesc: vs_weak talent: +X% damage against enemies below 50% HP.
GuardianHelp.efBulwarkDesc: Tank keystone: 1× per battle absorbs lethal hit (HP → 1). Icon disappears when consumed.
GuardianHelp.efDodgeDesc: evade_pct talent or evade ability avoids damage entirely.
GuardianHelp.efDmgRedDesc: dmg_reduction talent: reduces incoming damage by X% (permanent).
GuardianHelp.efRageDesc: 0–1000. +100 per attack, +50 per hit taken. At 1000 the active ultimate ignites.
GuardianHelp.efAwakeningDesc: Support keystone: 1× per battle full rage at start of round 3. Icon disappears when consumed.
GuardianHelp.efUltDesc: Active skill ultimate: base 3× Attack, +20% per skill level, +25% per expertise level.
GuardianHelp.efRoleBonusDesc: Role skill: +3% per level against natural type enemy. Mage: +2% against all.
GuardianHelp.efPowerZoneDesc: Parks/landmarks: flat +HP/+Attack/+Defense/+Speed while you're in the zone (attacker only).
GuardianHelp.frHeroRich: MyArea365 is not a pay-to-win app. Progress comes from real walking. Here are our promises.
GuardianHelp.frP2W1Rich: All purchasable items are flagged cosmetic_only — no combat stats
GuardianHelp.frP2W2Rich: Mystery box & skins give style, no advantages in battle
GuardianHelp.frP2W3Rich: Guardian Experience + gear with combat stats come exclusively from walking / redeeming / fighting
GuardianHelp.frDropsBody: All random drops are publicly documented (EU Digital Fairness Act). Voluntary disclosure also for free loot.
GuardianHelp.frGpsBody: So bonuses & rewards reflect real movement, we check position for:
GuardianHelp.frMonetBodyRich: We finance ourselves through premium subscriptions (skins/boosts/visibility), shop packs (arena hosting) and ads (flash deals). Never via combat advantages.

Cookie.introRich: We only set necessary cookies for login and security. For analytics and advertising we ask for your consent. Details in our privacy policy.

MapLegend.sanctumDesc: Daily guardian Experience boost when walking past.
MapLegend.powerZoneDesc: Zone with passive buff for your guardian.
MapLegend.flashDesc: Short-lived crew challenge spot — double reward in the first 15 min.
MapLegend.lootEpicDesc: Epic drop — get within 25 m to pick up

ersteSchritte.title: Getting Started
ersteSchritte.q1: What do I do right after signing up?
ersteSchritte.a1: 1) Pick a Guardian · 2) Open the dashboard · 3) Start a run (allow GPS) · 4) walk a few streets · 5) collect your first 🪙 Path Coins. Then: join a crew for territory bonuses.
ersteSchritte.q2: How do I start a run?
ersteSchritte.a2: Dashboard → "Start run" button. Allow GPS, then just walk or jog. Each new street segment = 50 🪙, complete street = +250 🪙 bonus.
ersteSchritte.a3: Everything gameplay-relevant: running, ranks, Guardians, crews, Arena (5 free fights/day), missions, achievements. The shop is purely optional — comfort, cosmetics, streak freezes. No pay-to-win.
ersteSchritte.q4: When does a crew pay off?
ersteSchritte.a4: Solo: max 250 🪙 per street. With crew: additional +500 🪙 per closed territory + 🏴 territory rep from crew wars (5,000 🏴 per win). Founding a crew is free.
ersteSchritte.q5: What's the difference between Arena and Crew War?
ersteSchritte.a5: Arena = 1v1 Guardian fight, personal, gives ⚔️ Arena Honor + loot. Crew War = your whole team vs. another crew, gives 🏴 territory rep. Both run separately and don't cannibalize each other.
ersteSchritte.q6: Do I have to spend money to be good?
ersteSchritte.a6: No. Top leaderboard spots are reached through real movement. Real money only buys time (streak freeze when sick), comfort (ad-free via MyArea+) and style (Runner Lights, themes). Path Coin boosts are limited and shorten — but never replace — actual movement.

grundlagen.title: Basics
grundlagen.a1: Walk or jog through your city. Every street segment you cover gets marked on the map and belongs to you. The more you run, the more 🪙 Path Coins you earn and the higher you climb in rank.
grundlagen.q2: What's the difference between segment, street and territory?
grundlagen.a2:
Street segment = smallest piece of street between two intersections (50 🪙 Path Coins).
Complete street = a full street, once you have all of its segments (+250 🪙 bonus).
Territory = the inside of a closed ring of multiple streets (+500 🪙, crew only).
grundlagen.a3: When multiple streets connect into a closed polygon (block, square, circle), MyArea365 automatically marks the inside as a territory. All streets surrounding it must be complete streets owned by you or your crew.
grundlagen.q4: Do I need a crew for territories?
grundlagen.a4: Yes. Solo runners see the closed ring as a gray dashed outline (claim pending), but only collect the 500 Path Coin bonus once they join or found a crew. That's what makes crews valuable.

waehrungen.title: Currencies & Ranks
waehrungen.a1:
Three separate reward streams, so an Arena loss doesn't destroy your runner progression:

🪙 Path Coins — running, territory claims, missions, shop Experience packs.
🏴 Territory Rep — crew war win, flag capture, crew duel, crew challenge.
⚔️ Arena Honor — Arena win (+) / Arena loss (−, floor at 0).
waehrungen.a2:
• New street segment: 50 🪙
• Complete street: +250 🪙 bonus
• Closed territory (crew): +500 🪙
• Daily/weekly missions: 200–500 🪙
• Milestones (first 10 km, 30-day streak etc.): extra bonus
waehrungen.a3:
• Crew war won: 5,000 🏴 to all active members
• Flag capture won: 3,000 🏴
• Weekly duel won: 2,000 🏴
• Crew challenge completed: variable reward

Territory Rep is personal — you carry it with you when changing crews, but it's only earned in crew context.
waehrungen.a4: Arena fights redistribute honor: winner gains ~+50 %, loser loses ~20 % of battle Experience. Cannot go negative (floor at 0). Tracked per season — prestige-relevant, but does not affect your Path Coins or rank.
waehrungen.q5: Do I get Path Coins for old streets I run again?
waehrungen.a5: Yes — but throttled, so nobody can farm. 24 h after the first claim: 0 (cooldown). 1–7 days: 30 % of normal value. 7–30 days: 60 %. After 30 days: full value again. Shown transparently in your run summary.
waehrungen.a6: Rank is based on total 🪙 Path Coins. From Street Scout (0) to Street God (250,000) there are 10 ranks with their own colors, mottos and rewards.

crewTerritorien.title: Crew & Territories
crewTerritorien.q1: How do I found a crew?
crewTerritorien.a1: "Crew" tab → "Found crew". You need a name, a color and a ZIP code as your turf. Crew members can then claim and defend territories together.
crewTerritorien.a2: Yes. If an enemy crew runs the ring and re-claims more than 50 % of segments, the territory changes color. The old crew gets a notification — revenge is possible. Steal bonus: 1.5× Path Coins for the raider.
crewTerritorien.q3: What happens if my crew is inactive?
crewTerritorien.a3: Territories expire after 30 days of inactivity to "unclaimed" and can be re-conquered by other crews. A single crew run per week is enough to hold the turf.

waechter.title: Guardians
waechter.a1: Your personal companion with their own level, class (Infantry/Cavalry/Sniper/Mage) and unique ability. The more you run, the stronger they get.
waechter.q2: How do I get new Guardians?
waechter.a2: Via summoning stones (every 10 km run = +1 stone), Arena wins, the shop, or as territory loot. Collect them all — there are 30+ archetypes across 4 rarities.
waechter.q3: Combat Arena — how does it work?
waechter.a3: 1v1 Guardian fights against other runners. 5 free fights per day, more for diamonds. Win = seals + gear + Guardian Experience + ⚔️ Arena Honor. Loss = small Arena Honor deduction (floor 0), nothing destroyed.

shop.title: Shop & Diamonds
shop.q1: Do I have to pay to be good?
shop.a1: No. All gameplay-relevant content (Guardians, territories, ranks) is fully playable without real money. The shop only offers comfort (streak freezes), cosmetics (map icons, Runner Lights) and time boosts.
shop.a2: 3 individual deals daily (Bronze/Silver/Gold) + optionally 1 Super Bundle. Each pack purchasable 1× per day. Reset at 00:00.
shop.a3: Premium subscription with streak-freeze stockpile, Path Coin boost, shop discount and exclusive map themes. Cancellable monthly.

sonstiges.title: Other
sonstiges.q1: Does MyArea365 run in the background?
sonstiges.a1: Yes, as long as the browser is open and GPS permission is granted. For continuous tracking we recommend the upcoming mobile app.
sonstiges.a2: We only store the minimum (routes, currency balances, profile). No sharing. Full GDPR info via the privacy link in the profile footer.
sonstiges.q3: I found a bug / have a suggestion
sonstiges.a3: Profile → Menu → 🎫 Support. We usually answer within 48 h.

Slide1.title: 1. Street Segment
Slide1.body: The smallest building block: a single piece of street between two intersections. Every segment you run first belongs to you — and earns 50 Path Coins.

Slide2.title: 2. Complete Street
Slide2.body: Once you've collected ALL segments of a street, it's unlocked as a complete street for you — plus a hefty 250 Path Coin bonus on top.

Slide3.title: 3. Territory (Crew thing)
Slide3.body: When multiple streets connect into a closed ring (block, square, circle), the inside becomes a territory. Important: territories are crew property. As a member you collect 500 Path Coins. Solo you can light up the ring — but the loot only starts flowing once you join a crew.

Slide4.title: 4. Your first week
Slide4.body: 🏃 Start a run: track GPS, claim streets, collect 🪙 Path Coins. 👥 Found/join a crew: +500 🪙 per territory & 🏴 territory rep through crew wars. ⚔️ Arena: 5 free fights/day, wins earn ⚔️ Arena Honor + loot. 💎 Shop: spend Path Coins or optionally real money (cosmetics, comfort, streak freezes — never pay-to-win).

overview.title: Members
overview.how: List of all active crew members sorted by 🏴 Reputation. The green dot shows who's online (active in the last 5 minutes). Admins and owners get badges. The more active your members, the stronger the crew in duels, wars and the season league.
overview.loot: No direct rewards — but the more active members you have, the more km, territories and arena wins flow into all other crew modes.
overview.tips: If members are inactive for more than 14 days: nudge them via chat or motivate via crew shouts.

war.title: Crew War (7-day feud)
war.how: Admins can declare war on other crews. If the target crew accepts, a 7-day match starts. During the feud, every km = 1 point, every claimed territory = 10 points. After the timer runs out, the crew with more points wins automatically. Declined or withdrawn invitations have no consequences.
war.loot: Winning crew: all active members get +5,000 🏴 Reputation. The win also goes into the season ranking and the crew feed (for bragging rights).
war.tips: Good time for a war: just before month end to push the season league. Pick opponents in your tier — even matches are more exciting.

season.title: Season League (monthly)
season.how: Every month a new season starts automatically. Crews collect points for territories (+5), duel wins and war wins. The ranking determines the tier (Bronze → Silver → Gold → Diamond → Legend). At month end the standings are frozen.
season.loot: Top placements at month end get rank badges on the crew profile (cosmetic + bragging rights). Diamond and Legend tier additionally give a bonus reputation multiplier in the next season (planned).
season.tips: Territories count the most. Toward month end, focus on polygon rings rather than individual streets.

flags.title: Capture the Flag (flash events)
flags.how: Spontaneous time-limited micro events. A flag appears at a ZIP, has a time window (e.g. 30 min) and a visit target (e.g. 10). Crew members run into the radius (GPS check) and tap 'I'm on site!'. The first crew to hit the visit target wins.
flags.loot: Winning crew: prize reputation (usually 3,000 🏴) is distributed to all members. The win also counts in the crew feed. Premium: winning crew name stays visible on the map for 1 hour (planned).
flags.tips: Reaction time matters. Mobilize everyone via crew chat in seconds. The closer you live to the flag spot, the bigger your advantage.

duel.title: Weekly Duel (auto-matchmaking)
duel.how: Automatic weekly 1:1 matchups between two crews of similar strength. Every km counts in both active duels (yours and the opponent's). Duels reset on Mondays, the winner is decided on Sunday.
duel.loot: Winner: prize reputation (usually 2,000 🏴) + points for the season league. Just participating already counts toward the weekly rating.
duel.tips: Every km helps — even short walks. Coordinate via chat who runs which days so you don't have a hole in the week.

challenges.title: Crew Challenges
challenges.how: Admins define shared goals (e.g. 'Crew runs 100 km together in 7 days', '10 new territories'). Progress is collective — every member contributes. When the crew hits the goal, everyone gets the reward.
challenges.loot: Reward reputation is distributed to all active crew members. Completed challenges land in the crew feed and count toward the season ranking.
challenges.tips: Stay realistic: with 5 members a 50-km weekly goal is enough; with 20 members 200 km is easy. Start with simple challenges, then escalate.

events.title: Group Runs
events.how: Every crew member can plan a group run (date, time, meeting point, distance, target pace). Other members reply with 'Going / Maybe / No'. The creator is automatically marked as 'Going'.
events.loot: No direct coins for the event itself — but: running together, you go further, collect more km → crew score in duel, war, season and challenges all rise simultaneously.
events.tips: Open meeting points work better (e.g. 'Südkreuz main entrance'). For regular runs: pick a recurring weekly slot.

chat.title: Crew Chat
chat.how: Realtime chat just for your crew. Messages appear instantly for all members (Supabase Realtime). Max 600 characters per message. You can delete your own messages.
chat.loot: Chat itself doesn't give Experience. But: good communication = more group runs = more crew wins.
chat.tips: Use it for event mobilization, challenge pushes, flag alerts and motivation. No spam — admins can revoke rights for abuse.

feed.title: Crew Feed
feed.how: Auto-generated activity stream: who joined, which territories were claimed, which challenges completed, which duels/wars won, members' arena wins. No manual posts — everything is driven by real crew actions.
feed.loot: No direct Experience. The feed serves transparency and motivation: you see what your crew is doing right now.
feed.tips: If the feed stays empty: members are inactive. That's the best indicator of crew health.

shop.title: Crew Cosmetic Shop
shop.how: Exclusive crew cosmetics, payable with gems (💎). Only admins can buy — items are activated for the whole crew. Some items are permanent (flag, territory color), others time-limited (30 days: name glow, banner animation).
shop.loot: No Experience — purely cosmetic for bragging rights and crew identity. Some items improve map visibility (e.g. custom territory color).
shop.tips: Worth it once you have ~10 active members. Start with a custom flag (500 💎) for recognition.

power.title: Crew Power (Pay-to-Progress)
power.how: Shared crew vault with gems. Members deposit 💎 from their account into the pool, admins use them to activate 7 power items (score boosts, shield, flag spawn, reroll, duel pick). Boosts ONLY push crew rankings (duel/war/season), not personal Experience — so runner ranks stay valuable.
power.loot: No direct Experience. But: +50% crew score multiplier in duel/war/season/challenges, protection against territory theft, strategic edge. Limit: max 1 boost active at once, max 72 h boost time per week.
power.tips: Score boosts are most worth it just before the end of a duel/war. Territory shield during ongoing enemy attacks. Member slot packs (€) when the crew fills up (start: 10 slots, max 100).

ShopPanels.howSec1: Set up once — then it just runs
ShopPanels.howSec1S1Body: Create a deal (e.g. Free cappuccino after 3 km run) in the Deals tab. You can pause or adjust at any time.
ShopPanels.howSec1S2Body: Print the QR code yourself or order an acrylic stand (from € 12.90) — once on the counter, done.
ShopPanels.howSec1S3Body: In the Quests tab you can set: anyone who buys a Latte Macchiato gets an extra seal. Runners photograph the receipt — AI checks automatically.

ShopPanels.howSec2S1Title: Runner scans your QR at the stand
ShopPanels.howSec2S1Body: The app verifies via GPS that the runner is really on site. No input, no code, no dashboard opening on your end.
ShopPanels.howSec2S2Italic: Screenshots have a static ring — instantly recognizable.
ShopPanels.howSec2S3Body: If your deal has a minimum spend (e.g. from € 5), it's shown big right on their screen. Cashier compares with the till total.
ShopPanels.howSec2S4Body: No input in our app. You don't type anything in your shop dashboard. The runner gets their reward automatically; you see the redemption later in Performance.
ShopPanels.howSec3: Automatic extra features (runs in the background)
ShopPanels.howF1Body: Runner voluntarily photographs the receipt → our AI reads the amount → from € 15 there's legendary loot (seal + equipment). Runners have a reason to buy more. You don't have to do anything.
ShopPanels.howF2Body: Got a quest (e.g. detect Latte Macchiato)? AI scans the receipt for the word → runner gets bonus. Configure once, never touch again.
ShopPanels.howF3Body: Anyone who regularly captures your shop area automatically gets +50% coins at your shop. Built-in regulars mechanism.
ShopPanels.howF4Body: In the Performance tab you see: redemptions today/week/month, top times, repeat rate, till contribution. All live.
ShopPanels.howEffortBody: Quick look at the performance, maybe adjust a deal seasonally or send a flash push when it's quiet. That's it.

LootDrops.metaDescription: Full disclosure of all random drops in MyArea365 — probabilities, rewards and mechanics for every loot type. Voluntary transparency in line with the EU Digital Fairness Act and national loot box regulations.
LootDrops.title: 🎲 Drop rates & loot transparency
LootDrops.intro: Full disclosure of all random drops in MyArea365. No gambling, no pay-to-win — movement is the only "currency". Even so, we voluntarily disclose what drops in which mechanic with what probability.
LootDrops.section1Title: QR redemption at shops — guardian loot
LootDrops.section1Body: After every successfully redeemed deal the server rolls random() and determines exactly one drop by the following distribution. The roll logic is documented in migration 00017_guardian_loot_drops.sql.
LootDrops.section2Foot: Item catalog and stats see migration 00018_guardian_equipment.sql.
LootDrops.section3Body: Spawn automatically every 90–120 seconds within ~450 m around the runner. From 30 m distance the crate is auto-collected.
LootDrops.section4Body: The only paid loot item. Always contains exactly 1 equipment item; rarity is rolled, but minimum rarity Common is guaranteed (no "nothing" roll). Shop announcement and transaction log fully visible in the profile under My purchases.
LootDrops.section5Body: No random rolls. Rewards are tied purely to measurable performance.
